sections.instruction: Questions 11-17: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 18-20: What does the speaker say about the following forms of transport? Write the correct letter, A, B, C, D, or E next to questions 18-20.

sections.instruction: Questions 21-26: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C. Questions 27 and 28: Choose TWO letters A-E. Questions 29 and 30: Choose TWO letters A-E.

questions.content: What does Ahmed say about last week’s seminar?
options: A He wasn’t able to get there on time.
B He didn’t know all the members.
C He couldn’t understand everything.

questions.content: What does the tutor say about Ahmed’s preparation for the seminar?
options: A He was better prepared than some students.
B He completed some useful work.
C He read some useful articles.

questions.content: What does Ahmed say about his participation in the seminar?
options: A He tended to speak to his neighbour only.
B He spoke when other students were talking.
C He felt embarrassed when students looked at him.

questions.content: What does Ahmed worry about most in seminars?
options: A speaking at the right time
B taking enough notes
C staying focused

questions.content: What does Ahmed say about his role in the group?
options: A He hasn’t thought about it.
B He’d like to change.
C He feels he is acting a part.

questions.content: At the next seminar, Ahmed’s tutor suggests that he should
options: A give other members more help with their work.
B observe the behaviour of other students.
C ask other students for their views.

questions.content: Which TWO strategies does the tutor suggest for the next seminar?
options: A speak more frequently
B behave in a confident manner
C sit next to someone helpful
D listen to what other people say
E think of questions to ask

questions.content: Which TWO suggestions does the tutor make about taking notes?
options: A plan them before the seminar
B note down key words that people say
C note points to say later
D include self-analysis
E rewrite them after the seminar

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

DESERT PLANTS
Background
• Deserts found in what is known as a (31) {{BLANK}} (or dry area)

General adaptations of desert plants
• They can (34) {{BLANK}} and store water
• They have features that reduce water loss.
Examples of adaptations
• Saguaro Cactus: stores water in its (35) {{BLANK}}
• Barrel Cactus: can (36) {{BLANK}} or shrink according to weather
• Old Man Cactus: has (37) {{BLANK}} that reflect the sun
• Prickly Pear Cactus: has (38) {{BLANK}} to keep away animals
• Desert Spoon: leaves are (39) {{BLANK}} to reduce water loss
• Aloe Plant: leaf surface acts like a (40) {{BLANK}} covering and keeps water inside
